en: Then Moses went up from the plains of Moab to Mount Nebo, to the top of Pisgah, which is opposite Jericho. And the LORD showed him all the land, Gilead as far as Dan,
zh: 摩西從摩押平原上了尼波山，就是上了耶利哥對面的毘斯迦山頂。耶和華把全地指給他看，就是把基列直到但，

en: all Naphtali, the land of Ephraim and Manasseh, all the land of Judah as far as the western sea,
zh: 拿弗他利全地，以法蓮和瑪拿西之地，猶大全地，直到西海，

en: the Negeb, and the Plain, that is, the Valley of Jericho the city of palm trees, as far as Zoar.
zh: 南地和那平原，就是棕樹城耶利哥的盆地，直到瑣珥，都指給他看。

en: And the LORD said to him, "This is the land of which I swore to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, 'I will give it to your offspring.' I have let you see it with your eyes, but you shall not go over there."
zh: 耶和華對他說：“這就是我曾經向亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各起誓應許之地，說：‘我要把這地賜給你的後裔。’現在我讓你親眼看見了，可是你不能過到那邊去。”

en: So Moses the servant of the LORD died there in the land of Moab, according to the word of the LORD,
zh: 於是耶和華的僕人摩西，照著耶和華所說的，死在摩押地。

en: and he buried him in the valley in the land of Moab opposite Beth-peor; but no one knows the place of his burial to this day.
zh: 耶和華把他埋葬在摩押地，伯．毘珥對面的山谷裡，只是直到今日還沒有人知道埋葬他的地方。

en: Moses was 120 years old when he died. His eye was undimmed, and his vigor unabated.
zh: 摩西死的時候，已經一百二十歲；他的眼睛沒有昏花，他的精力也沒有衰退。

en: And the people of Israel wept for Moses in the plains of Moab thirty days. Then the days of weeping and mourning for Moses were ended.
zh: 以色列人在摩押平原為摩西哀哭了三十日；然後為摩西守喪哀哭的日子就滿了。

en: And Joshua the son of Nun was full of the spirit of wisdom, for Moses had laid his hands on him. So the people of Israel obeyed him and did as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 嫩的兒子約書亞，因為摩西曾經按手在他身上，就充滿了智慧的靈；以色列人就聽從他，照著耶和華吩咐摩西的去行了。

en: And there has not arisen a prophet since in Israel like Moses, whom the LORD knew face to face,
zh: 以後在以色列中，再沒有興起一位先知像摩西一樣的；他是耶和華面對面所認識的。

en: none like him for all the signs and the wonders that the LORD sent him to do in the land of Egypt, to Pharaoh and to all his servants and to all his land,
zh: 耶和華差遣他在埃及地，向法老和他的一切臣僕，以及他的全地行了一切神蹟和奇事。

en: and for all the mighty power and all the great deeds of terror that Moses did in the sight of all Israel.
zh: 摩西又在以色列眾人眼前行了一切大能的事，和一切大而可畏的事。
